description: Provider resolver defaults to openrouter when AI_CHAT_PROVIDER is missing
Provider resolver returns OpenRouter client/model when OpenRouter config is present
Provider resolver returns Vertex client/model when AI_CHAT_PROVIDER=vertex and required config exists
Vertex provider uses explicit VERTEX_OPENAPI_BASE_URL when provided
Vertex provider derives base URL from VERTEX_PROJECT_ID and VERTEX_LOCATION when explicit URL is absent
Vertex provider returns clear configuration error when required access token is missing
Vertex request does not include thinking override payload when VERTEX_ENABLE_THINKING is true or unset
Vertex request includes turn-level thinking disable payload when VERTEX_ENABLE_THINKING=false
OpenRouter requests never include Vertex-specific thinking override payload
Completion request validation accepts assistant messages with string reasoning_content
Completion request validation rejects invalid reasoning_content types
Conversation normalization preserves reasoning_content values on assistant messages
Client-facing message sanitization does not drop reasoning_content needed for continuation
Vertex message builder includes reasoning_content for assistant messages with preserved thinking
OpenRouter message builder omits reasoning_content while maintaining compatible assistant payload
Reasoning extraction derives reasoning_content from legacy <think> content when explicit reasoning_content is absent
Response parsing prioritizes reasoning_content field over fallback reasoning field when both exist
Response parsing falls back to reasoning field when reasoning_content is absent
Assistant message appended during tool-call turn includes preserved reasoning_content
Assistant message appended on final non-tool response includes preserved reasoning_content
Non-stream completion path uses provider-resolved model/client for OpenRouter
Non-stream completion path uses provider-resolved model/client for Vertex
Completion requests preserve tool_choice:auto for both providers
function_proposed response includes nextMessages/modelMessages with preserved reasoning context
execute-after-approval continuation sends preserved assistant context and tool result before requesting follow-up completion
Declined execution path preserves conversation consistency and returns assistant follow-up without executing endpoint
handleExecute returns 400 for missing function call data
Tool call identifiers remain stable between proposed call and function result replay
Streaming route request validation accepts assistant reasoning_content
Streaming route emits structured content-delta SSE events
Streaming route emits structured reasoning-delta SSE events
Streaming route emits function-proposal SSE event when model chooses tool call
Streaming route emits terminal done event after successful completion
Streaming route stops emission cleanly when request signal is aborted
Streaming route returns 400 for malformed messages payload
Streaming route preserves aiAssistant feature gating response semantics
Streaming route preserves enterprise-edition gating response semantics
SSE reader accumulates content tokens correctly from structured events
SSE reader invokes onReasoning callback for reasoning events
SSE reader invokes onToolCalls callback for function proposal events
SSE reader stops and returns doneReceived=true on done event
SSE reader ignores malformed JSON lines without crashing
SSE reader cancels underlying reader when shouldContinue returns false
Chat component updates in-progress reasoning state when reasoning stream events arrive
Chat component sets pendingFunction when function proposal stream event arrives
Approve action posts /api/chat/v1/execute with streamed functionCall metadata
Decline action posts /api/chat/v1/execute with action=decline and keeps conversation usable
Chat marks interrupted stream state correctly on stop/abort without false completion
Quick Ask expanded chat path can receive streamed function proposal and complete approve->execute loop
Right Sidebar chat path can receive streamed function proposal and complete approve->execute loop
DB-backed happy path: approved function execution completes and persists final assistant message for the chat
DB-backed guard path: declined or failed execution does not persist a false completed assistant message
OpenRouter provider compatibility: streaming text-only responses still render correctly when no tool call occurs
Vertex provider compatibility: reasoning+content streaming without tools still yields final assistant response
Vertex preserved-thinking loop: second request after tool result includes prior assistant reasoning_content
Unknown provider value falls back safely to OpenRouter behavior
Env example documentation includes both provider setup blocks and required keys
No migration required: chat persistence schema remains unchanged and existing read/write flows still pass
